about.title: About us
about.content: TexCheck is a Fleet Monitoring Platform for predictive maintenance and asset optimization.

hero.title: TexCheck for your textile shop floor
hero.lead: Move beyond spreadsheets and paper trails: machinery maintenance, asset-level traceability, and preventive planning in one platform.

leaders.title: Operations leaders
leaders.subtitle: Shop-floor visibility and data-backed decisions
leaders.f1: KPIs and dashboards for performance and cost tracking
leaders.f2: Failures and downtime surfaced so you can prioritize
leaders.f3: Preventive planning and follow-through on compliance

staff.title: Maintenance staff
staff.subtitle: Less friction on the floor, more actionable context
staff.f1: Fast logging of issues and work performed
staff.f2: Clear coordination across teams and shifts
staff.f3: Machine and component history always within reach
staff.f4: Workflows shaped for mobile use on the aisle

cta.title: Want the big picture?
cta.hint: The dashboard brings together your overview and key shop-floor metrics.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.content: Fleet overview and key metrics will appear here.
